summary: COMPARISON two Axes with target density 2x. LEFT BLUE histogram of max(U,V) from 1500 i.i.d. Uniform pairs; RIGHT GREEN histogram of √W from 1500 uniform samples; both fit the f=2x line. 20 bins via numpy.histogram with density=True; Rectangles placed on axes. Bottom derivation uses CDF argument: P(max(U,V)≤x) = x² = P(W ≤ x²) = P(√W ≤ x), proving distributional equality.
